whoWeAre.title: Who We Are

items.text: We are a Polish company specializing in premium and high quality branded marketing products tailored to each client's vision.
At IN2, we operate as an external creative marketing partner — helping brands transform ideas into memorable, beautifully crafted experiences that people genuinely want to keep, use and remember.

Unlike traditional promotional suppliers focused on cheap, repetitive products, we believe low-quality merchandise damages brand perception. In today's market, generic lanyards and disposable logo mugs are no longer effective marketing — they are anti-advertising.
That is why we work exclusively with carefully selected premium products, elegant branding techniques and refined packaging solutions designed to elevate the way your brand is perceived.

whoWeAre.highlight: Because strong brands deserve more than disposable gadgets.

steps.title: You share the vision
steps.text: You provide the vision, occasion and budget.

steps.title: We deliver, fully managed
steps.text: We deliver product sourcing, branding concepts, packaging design, production and logistics — fully managed from start to finish.

chat.title: IN2 Assistant
chat.greeting: Hi! I'm the IN2 assistant. Ask me anything about premium corporate gifting, branding techniques, our products or how to start a project.
